ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group classification of the subject (e.g., A, B) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the subject was enrolled in the study */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any relevant medical history that might affect the study */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject participating in the session */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the training (e.g., train, test) */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start time of the session (in minutes from start) */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Goal value for the training session */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the session (in minutes from start) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations made during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_subj_id FOREIGN KEY ("subj_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session the response belongs to */,
  "rt" INTEGER /* Reaction time in milliseconds */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path taken by the subject during the session */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Number of response events in the session */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the response (percentage or binary) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, test) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment conditions during the session (e.g., quiet room, noisy environment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timestamps" (
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestamp entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session the timestamp belongs to */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp in seconds since epoch */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Human-readable date and time of the session */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the timestamp */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timestamps_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "rt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response record */,
  "rt_value" INTEGER /* Value of the reaction time */,
  "rt_tot" INTEGER /* Total of all reaction times in this session */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the response associated with the reaction time */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_times_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each path record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session associated with the path */,
  "path" TEXT /* Description of the path taken during the session */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment conditions during the session (e.g., quiet room, noisy environment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paths_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session associated with this length */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Total length of responses during this session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lengths_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session associated with this goal */,
  "goal_value" INTEGER /* The target goal value for the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Group A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group's purpose or characteristics */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, assistant) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the session */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the session was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations made during the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the resource */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Specific resource accessed (e.g., subject data, experiment data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject providing feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Textual feedback provided by the subject */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was collected */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numeric rating given by the subject (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, test) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback is anonymous or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_subj_id FOREIGN KEY ("subj_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subj_id")
)
